---
title: "Projects"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
editor: source
---

## Overview

This page showcases selected geospatial and remote sensing projects developed during my Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management at the University of British Columbia.

These projects demonstrate experience in:

-   Geographic Information Systems (GIS)
-   Remote sensing
-   Spatial analysis
-   Reproducible geospatial workflows using R and Quarto

## Selected Projects

:::::: project-grid
<a href="agriculture.html" class="project-card-link">

::: project-card
```         
<img src="images/cover-page.jpg" alt="Agricultural landscape transitions project" class="project-card-img">
<div class="project-card-body">
  <h3>Assessing Critical Transitions in Agricultural Landscapes</h3>
  <p>
    Harmonized land-cover analysis of agricultural transitions in the Lower Fraser Valley, British Columbia, with emphasis on adjacency, interspersion, and opportunities for perennial agriculture adoption.
  </p>
</div>
```
:::

</a>

<a href="lidar.html" class="project-card-link">

::: project-card
```         
<img src="images/forest-agric.png" alt="LiDAR or forest structure project" class="project-card-img">
<div class="project-card-body">
  <h3>LiDAR-Based Tree Detection and Segmentation</h3>
  <p>
    Forest structure analysis using LiDAR point clouds, canopy height models, and individual tree detection workflows.
  </p>
</div>
```
:::

</a>

<a href="hyperspectral.html" class="project-card-link">

::: project-card
```         
<img src="images/harmonized_maps.png" alt="Hyperspectral vegetation analysis project" class="project-card-img">
<div class="project-card-body">
  <h3>Hyperspectral Vegetation Analysis</h3>
  <p>
    Spectral interpretation of vegetation and non-vegetation classes using reflectance curves and hyperspectral remote sensing workflows.
  </p>
</div>
```
:::

</a>
::::::
